response: Among the composers mentioned, Luigi Cherubini was the one who wrote his music most recently. Luigi Cherubini composed "Ali Baba" in 1833, which was his last opera, and he lived for nearly a decade after its premiere. Michael Tippett composed "A Child of Our Time" in 1944, which was his only major work after his death in 1998. Thus, Luigi Cherubini was the composer who wrote his music most recently.
